summary: Tested FIX 1 (intro web guard) and FIX 2 (case auto-navigate) as specified. All 3 test scenarios passed.
critical_code_review_comments: intro.tsx: web guard (Platform.OS==='web' → navigateAway()) is correct and verified working
cases/new.tsx: router.back() called unconditionally after save - correct, popup no longer blocks navigation
seed_data_creation: Created test clients and cases via UI during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: FIX 1 and FIX 2 are both working correctly. Intro web guard redirects /intro → /login instantly on web. Case save navigates back immediately with or without a linked client.

test_results.FIX1_intro_web_guard: PASS - /intro redirects to /login immediately on web (Platform.OS==='web' guard works)
test_results.FIX2_case_save_no_client: PASS - Creating case TEST001 (case number, title, court) → tapping Create Case → auto-navigated back to /cases list, no popup
test_results.FIX2_case_save_with_client: PASS - Creating case TEST005 with Test Client linked → tapping Create Case → auto-navigated back to /cases list immediately, no NotifyClientPopup blocking
